_comment: Copy to retail_attention.json (gitignored). A retail-attention proxy (magnitude/lateness, NOT a trigger — pairs with retail_froth). Refresh ~1-2x/month; this data moves on weekly/monthly timescales, no need for daily pulls. WSB half auto-fills via `uv run python -m degen.macro attention` (ApeWisdom, free). Google-Trends half is hand-entered: open trends.google.com (US, 12m), read the 0-100 interest for each term, drop today's into terms and last month's into prior.
note: rising search interest + WSB mention velocity = the non-trader public flooding in
